scene.message: Mark: The doctor's the same{nl} here too — what a relief.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: I'm relieved the Doctor{nl} is a decent sort...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: I-{wait_fr:32}I'm not gonna get{nl} a shot, am I...{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: What, a cold? A cold{nl} just needs rest to cure!{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: All right then,{nl} all of you...{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: Hm. Let's get you{nl} treated, then.{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: Mm, that should do it.{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: Good. Come straight{nl} back if anything comes up.{waitkey}{ret}
